questions.question: Describe the function of a memory controller in a system bus. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A CPU's memory address bus is connected to a memory controller, which regulates memory access

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of a cache memory in a computer system? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Cache memory is a small, fast memory that stores frequently accessed data to reduce access time to the main memory

questions.question: Explain the differences between a P-Channel FET and an N-Channel FET used in synchronization hardware. (10 marks)
questions.hint: P-Channel FETs have a positive gate voltage, while N-Channel FETs have a negative gate voltage; P-Channel FETs are typically used for high-speed applications, while N-Channel FETs are used for low-power applications
